_note: Demo session — fictional character for testing purposes

target.jobDescription:
Global Acquisitions & Relocation Enterprises (GARE) is seeking a highly experienced Director of International Asset Recovery to lead our Miami-based operations division. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of locating and recovering high-value assets across multiple international jurisdictions, with demonstrated expertise in disguise, evasion, and misdirection techniques.

Key Responsibilities:
- Lead a team of field operatives across 6 continents to track and recover misappropriated assets
- Develop and execute multi-jurisdictional recovery strategies with minimal advance disclosure
- Maintain operational security across all recovery missions while coordinating with Interpol liaisons
- Leverage deep expertise in geography, cultural customs, and local law enforcement blind spots
- Produce detailed after-action reports summarizing recovery methods and lessons learned
- Build and maintain a global network of informants, fences, and transportation contacts
- Oversee logistics for rapid asset movement including air, sea, and overland routes

Required Qualifications:
- 10+ years of experience in international asset recovery or related field operations
- Demonstrated ability to operate across all 7 continents under challenging conditions
- Expert knowledge of global geography, landmarks, and cultural customs
- Strong background in disguise, identity management, and counter-surveillance
- Fluency in at least 4 languages; 7+ preferred
- Proven ability to remain one step ahead of pursuing investigators
- Must be comfortable with irregular hours, international travel (estimated 280+ days/year), and working alone or in small teams
- Red coat and wide-brimmed hat not required but considered a plus

Compensation & Benefits:
- Base salary $140,000 - $175,000 DOE
- Performance bonus tied to successful asset recovery rate
- Unlimited international travel budget
- Global health insurance with coverage in 190+ countries
- ACME Corporation 401(k) with 6% match
- Flexible location: Miami HQ with 80% travel expected

GARE is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on nationality, alias, or number of outstanding Interpol notices.

resumeText:
CARMEN SANDIEGO
Professional World Traveler & Asset Relocation Specialist
Location: Undisclosed | carmen@vilhq.net | Available: Immediately (pending Interpol clearance)

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Highly accomplished international operations specialist with 25+ years of documented experience in global asset acquisition, evasion strategy, and geographic expertise across all 7 continents. Former ACME Corporation field agent turned independent contractor. Known for exceptional attention to detail, signature red coat presentation, and an unbroken streak of arriving exactly one step ahead of pursuing investigators. Seeking to leverage deep institutional knowledge of global criminal enterprises, geography trivia, and misdirection methodology in a legitimate Director-level role.

CORE COMPETENCIES
Global Operations: Executed 400+ successful international acquisition operations across 193 countries without a single confirmed apprehension
Geographic Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of world capitals, landmarks, currencies, customs, and local law enforcement response times
Team Leadership: Built and managed V.I.L.E. global operations team of 50+ field operatives including The Contessa, Eartha Brute, and Lars Vegas
Languages: Fluent in English, French, Spanish, Japanese, Arabic, Italian, Mandarin, and conversational Swahili
Disguise & Identity Management: Successfully maintained 47 distinct cover identities across 6 continents; zero confirmed identity compromises
Logistics: Coordinated rapid international asset movement via air, sea, rail, and camel; expert in customs evasion and border crossing optimization
Research & Intelligence: Leveraged Almanac, encyclopedia, and geography clue systems to stay ahead of ACME tracking technology

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Founder & Chief Executive
V.I.L.E. (Villains' International League of Evil) | Global | 2000 – Present
- Built global criminal enterprise from ground up; grew organization to 50+ operatives with presence in 80+ countries
- Achieved 99.7% successful asset acquisition rate across 400+ high-profile operations targeting museums, national monuments, and government facilities
- Developed proprietary clue-based communication system enabling ACME agents to track operations exactly one step behind — a deliberate competitive moat
- Managed organizational budget in excess of $2B in recovered assets annually
- Maintained operational security through rigorous use of geographic trivia as encrypted communications
- Featured in 6 television series, 3 video game franchises, and a Netflix original series

Senior Field Agent
ACME Detective Agency | San Francisco, CA | 1992 – 2000
- Conducted field investigations across 150+ international jurisdictions
- Specialized in geography-based intelligence analysis and suspect tracking
- Trained junior agents in global travel logistics, cultural customs, and landmark identification
- Repeatedly recognized as top field agent before transitioning to independent operations
- Maintained perfect safety record; zero civilian casualties across all operations

EDUCATION
B.A. International Studies & Geography, Stanford University, 1992
Certificate in Advanced Disguise & Identity Management, ACME Academy, 1993
Certificate in Global Asset Logistics, undisclosed institution, 2001

CERTIFICATIONS
- Interpol Registered Fugitive (Active) — demonstrates international recognition
- ACME Detective Agency Alumni — demonstrates institutional credibility
- World Geography Expert Certification — scored 100% on National Geographic assessment
- Pilot License: Fixed Wing, Rotary, and Experimental (7 countries)

NOTABLE ACHIEVEMENTS
- Successfully relocated the Eiffel Tower, the Liberty Bell, and the Nile River in single fiscal year
- Featured on FBI and Interpol most-wanted lists in 12 countries simultaneously — demonstrates global brand recognition
- Never successfully apprehended despite 25+ years of active pursuit by ACME, CIA, FBI, MI6, and Mossad
- Subject of award-winning PBS educational series teaching geography to millions of children

REFERENCES
Available upon request. Note: Chief Inspector Devineaux is not a reliable reference.
